-PORTVERSION=	0.14
+PORTVERSION=	0.20
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-

-MAN3=	CGI::Application::Plugin::Authentication::Driver.3 \

 	CGI::Application::Plugin::Authentication::Driver::Filter::sha1.3 \
